overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of an abandoned industrial building and surrounding desert shanty town at night. The player exits a dark warehouse into a moonlit wasteland with a large suspension bridge in the distance, then pursues an NPC through the settlement.

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark warehouse toward a distant exit doorway

entered.detail: shattered glass panels in the warehouse ceiling revealing night sky
rusted metal walkway with grid pattern
wall with red painted markings and symbols
large industrial concrete columns supporting the structure
large open exit leading to the outside

segments.scene_description: The player navigates a dark, abandoned warehouse interior with broken skylights overhead. The environment features industrial concrete pillars, metal grating floors, and red graffiti on the walls as the camera moves toward a visible exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert shanty town with abandoned structures

events.description: exits the dark warehouse into the open night air of a desert wasteland

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned settlement, surveying the shacks and distant bridge structure

entered.detail: large illuminated bridge structure spanning the horizon with cable supports
dilapidated wooden hut with corrugated metal roof
tall pole with bright spotlight illuminating the area
overhead electrical cables stretching across the scene

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the warehouse, the scene opens into a wide desert wasteland under a night sky. The player explores a shanty town of abandoned wooden shacks and derelict vehicles, with a massive illuminated suspension bridge visible in the distant background.

events.description: begins running to pursue a fleeing character in a yellow tank top

agents.ego_description: chasing a fleeing NPC through the narrow paths between shacks and obstacles

notable_agents.action: running away from the player through the shanty town, jumping over obstacles

entered.detail: piles of garbage bags and debris stacked beside buildings

segments.scene_description: The player breaks into a run to pursue an NPC wearing a yellow tank top and purple pants through the narrow alleyways of the settlement. The chase weaves between wooden shacks, trash piles, and abandoned vehicles as the character flees toward the bridge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt path approaching highway overpass

events.description: target character climbs over abandoned car and continues fleeing

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the bridge after the pursuit, observing the illuminated billboard

entered.detail: large commercial sign with bright red and white lighting
metal safety barrier along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dense shanty area onto a clearer dirt path leading toward the massive suspension bridge. An illuminated billboard glows on the left while the bridge structure looms larger in the center, with guard rails lining the approach to the highway overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic interior of a dark warehouse into a sprawling, moonlit desert settlement. It begins by navigating through an abandoned industrial space filled with concrete pillars and red graffiti, moving steadily toward a distant exit. As the camera emerges from the warehouse, the environment opens into a wide wasteland of derelict vehicles and wooden shacks beneath a night sky, with a massive illuminated suspension bridge looming in the distance. The scene then shifts into a fast-paced pursuit, weaving through narrow alleyways and trash piles in chase of an NPC in a yellow tank top and purple pants. Finally, the camera breaks out of the dense shanty town onto a clear dirt path, passing a glowing billboard as the bridge structure grows larger and the highway overpass comes into view.
